description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake with a light beige to cream-colored base and a thick layer of chocolate ganache dripping down the sides. The top is generously decorated with chocolate curls, shavings, and possibly small pieces of white and milk chocolate, creating a visually rich and indulgent appearance. The cake's surface is slightly uneven, suggesting a hand-frosted finish, and the chocolate drips are irregular, adding to its artisanal charm. The cake sits on a simple, slightly raised, off-white platform or plate that is wider than the cake itself. The overall look is decadent and inviting, with a focus on chocolate as the main decorative and flavor element. This cake would be a centerpiece in a bakery window, café, or urban street food market.
description: A round, single-tier cake with chocolate ganache drips and chocolate curls on top, displayed on a simple off-white plate. The cake has a rich, artisanal appearance with a focus on chocolate decoration.
description_view_0: Front view shows the thick chocolate ganache drips and a dense cluster of chocolate curls and shavings on top.
description_view_1: This side highlights the longest, most pronounced chocolate drips and a slightly more uneven frosting edge.
description_view_2: The top view reveals the full spread of chocolate decorations and the evenness of the cake's round shape.
description_view_3: This angle emphasizes the smooth, rounded base and the continuation of chocolate drips around the cake.
